procedure.name: UpdateDmsObjectPermsRec
procedure.text:
create or replace function UpdateDmsObjectPermsRec(&&ObjId&& bigint) returns table(&&CurrentId&& bigint, &&ParentId&& bigint, &&CreationAuthor&& bigint)
as $$
with recursive t_Rec as ( select d.&&Id&&, d.&&Folder&&, d.&&CreationAuthor&& from &&DmsObject&& d where d.&&Id&& = $1 union all select dc.&&Id&&, dc.&&Folder&&, dc.&&CreationAuthor&& from &&DmsObject&& dc inner join t_Rec on t_Rec.&&Id&& = dc.&&Folder&& and dc.&&InheritPermissions&& = 1 )
select &&Id&& as &&CurrentId&&, &&Folder&& as &&ParentId&&, &&CreationAuthor&& from t_Rec
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: FolderTreeForUser

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select &&Id&&, &&Name&&, &&CreationDate&&, ft.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&NodeTypeUid&&, ft.&&ImageUrl&& as &&ImageUrl&&, ft.&&Virtual&& as &&Virtual&&, ft.&&PermissionId&& as &&PermissionId&&, ft.&&Expanded&& as &&Expanded&&, ft.&&HasChild&&, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERTREEFORUSER(:rootId, :userId, :treeId) ft order by coalesce(ft.&&Folder&&, 0) asc, coalesce(ft.&&SortTypeId&&, 0) asc, &&Name&& asc

procedure.text:
create or replace function FOLDERTREEFORUSER(&&rootId&& bigint, &&userId&& bigint, &&treeId&& char(32)) returns table( &&Id&& bigint, &&Name&& text, &&Folder&& bigint, &&CreationAuthor&& bigint, &&CreationDate&& timestamp, &&NodeTypeUid&& uuid, &&ImageUrl&& text, &&Virtual&& smallint, &&PermissionId&& uuid, &&SortTypeId&& bigint, &&Expanded&& smallint, &&HasChild&& smallint, &&Depth&& bigint)
as $$
select distinct d.&&Id&&, d.&&Name&&, d.&&Folder&&, d.&&CreationAuthor&&, d.&&CreationDate&&, d.&&TypeUid&&, f.&&ImageUrl&&, d.&&Virtual&&, p.&&PermissionId&&, d.&&SortTypeId&&, s1.&&Expanded&&, f.&&HasChildFolders&&, r1.&&Depth&& from &&Sys_DmsObjectRelation&& r1 inner join &&sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState&& s on s.&&DmsObject&& = r1.&&Child&& inner join &&Sys_DmsObjectRelation&& r2 on r2.&&Parent&& = s.&&DmsObject&& inner join &&Folder&& f on f.&&Id&& = r2.&&Child&& inner join &&DmsObject&& d on d.&&Id&& = f.&&Id&& inner join &&DmsObjectPermission&& p on p.&&DmsObject&& = f.&&Id&& inner join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& c on c.&&SetId&& = p.&&UserSecuritySetCacheId&& left join &&sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState&& s1 on s1.&&TreeId&& = $3 and s1.&&User&& = $2 and s1.&&DmsObject&& = f.&&Id&& and s1.&&Expanded&& = 1 and s1.&&ParentExpanded&& = 1 where (d.&&IsDeleted&& is null or d.&&IsDeleted&& = 0) and c.&&UserId&& = $2 and r1.&&Parent&& = $1 and s.&&TreeId&& = $3 and s.&&User&& = $2 and s.&&Expanded&& = 1 and s.&&ParentExpanded&& = 1 and r2.&&Depth&& < 2 and r2.&&Owner&& in ($2, 0)
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: FolderTreeForAdmin

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select ft.&&Id&&, ft.&&Name&&, ft.&&CreationDate&&, ft.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&NodeTypeUid&&, ft.&&ImageUrl&& as &&ImageUrl&&, ft.&&Virtual&& as &&Virtual&&, null as &&PermissionId&&, ft.&&Expanded&& as &&Expanded&&, ft.&&HasChild&&, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERTREEFORADMIN(:rootId, :userId, :treeId) ft order by coalesce(ft.&&Folder&&, 0) asc, coalesce(ft.&&SortTypeId&&, 0) asc, &&Name&& asc

procedure.text:
create or replace function FOLDERTREEFORADMIN(&&rootId&& bigint, &&userId&& bigint, &&treeId&& char(32)) returns table( &&Id&& bigint, &&Name&& text, &&Folder&& bigint, &&CreationAuthor&& bigint, &&CreationDate&& timestamp, &&NodeTypeUid&& uuid, &&ImageUrl&& text, &&Virtual&& smallint, &&SortTypeId&& bigint, &&Expanded&& smallint, &&HasChild&& smallint, &&Depth&& bigint)
as $$
select distinct d.&&Id&&, d.&&Name&&, d.&&Folder&&, d.&&CreationAuthor&&, d.&&CreationDate&&, d.&&TypeUid&& &&NodeTypeUid&&, f.&&ImageUrl&&, d.&&Virtual&&, d.&&SortTypeId&&, s1.&&Expanded&&, f.&&HasChildFolders&& &&HasChild&&, r1.&&Depth&& from &&Sys_DmsObjectRelation&& r1 inner join &&sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState&& s on s.&&DmsObject&& = r1.&&Child&& inner join &&Sys_DmsObjectRelation&& r2 on r2.&&Parent&& = s.&&DmsObject&& inner join &&Folder&& f on f.&&Id&& = r2.&&Child&& inner join &&DmsObject&& d on d.&&Id&& = f.&&Id&& left join &&sys_DmsObjectTreeNodeState&& s1 on s1.&&TreeId&& = $3 and s1.&&User&& = $2 and s1.&&DmsObject&& = f.&&Id&& and s1.&&Expanded&& = 1 and s1.&&ParentExpanded&& = 1 where (d.&&IsDeleted&& is null or d.&&IsDeleted&& = 0) and r1.&&Parent&& = $1 and s.&&TreeId&& = $3 and s.&&User&& = $2 and s.&&Expanded&& = 1 and s.&&ParentExpanded&& = 1 and r2.&&Depth&& < 2 and r2.&&Owner&& in ($2, 0)
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: FolderFullTreeForUser

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select &&Id&&, &&Name&&, &&CreationDate&&, ft.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&NodeTypeUid&&, ft.&&ImageUrl&& as &&ImageUrl&&, ft.&&Virtual&& as &&Virtual&&, ft.&&PermissionId&& as &&PermissionId&&, ft.&&Expanded&& as &&Expanded&&, ft.&&HasChild&&, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERFULLTREEFORUSER(:rootId, :userId, :treeId) ft order by coalesce(ft.&&Folder&&, 0) asc, coalesce(ft.&&SortTypeId&&, 0) asc, &&Name&& asc

procedure.name: FolderFullTreeForAdmin

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select &&Id&&, &&Name&&, &&CreationDate&&, ft.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&NodeTypeUid&&, ft.&&ImageUrl&& as &&ImageUrl&&, ft.&&Virtual&& as &&Virtual&&, null as &&PermissionId&&, ft.&&Expanded&& as &&Expanded&&, ft.&&HasChild&&, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERFULLTREEFORADMIN(:rootId, :userId, :treeId) ft order by coalesce(ft.&&Folder&&, 0) asc, coalesce(ft.&&SortTypeId&&, 0) asc, &&Name&& asc

procedure.name: FolderFullTree

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select &&Id&&, &&Name&&, &&CreationDate&&, ft.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&NodeTypeUid&&, ft.&&ImageUrl&& as &&ImageUrl&&, ft.&&Virtual&& as &&Virtual&&, null as &&PermissionId&&, null as &&Expanded&&, ft.&&HasChild&&, ft.&&Depth&& from FOLDERFULLTREE(:rootId) ft

procedure.text:
create or replace function FOLDERFULLTREE(&&rootId&& bigint) returns table( &&Id&& bigint, &&Name&& text, &&Folder&& bigint, &&CreationAuthor&& bigint, &&CreationDate&& timestamp, &&NodeTypeUid&& uuid, &&ImageUrl&& text, &&Virtual&& smallint, &&SortTypeId&& bigint, &&HasChild&& smallint, &&Depth&& bigint)
as $$
select d.&&Id&&, d.&&Name&&, d.&&Folder&&, d.&&CreationAuthor&&, d.&&CreationDate&&, d.&&TypeUid&& &&NodeTypeUid&&, f.&&ImageUrl&&, d.&&Virtual&&, d.&&SortTypeId&&, f.&&HasChildFolders&& &&HasChild&&, r.&&Depth&& from &&Sys_DmsObjectRelation&& r inner join &&Folder&& f on f.&&Id&& = r.&&Child&& inner join &&DmsObject&& d on d.&&Id&& = f.&&Id&& where (d.&&IsDeleted&& is null or d.&&IsDeleted&& = 0) and r.&&Parent&& = $1
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetRootQuery
procedure.text:
create or replace function GetRootFolder(p_Folder bigint) returns table ( &&Id&& bigint, &&Name&& text, &&FolderId&& bigint, &&FolderType&& integer, &&CreationAuthor&& bigint )
as $$
with recursive t_Rec as ( select dobc.&&Id&&, dobc.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, dobc.&&Folder&&, flc.&&FolderType&&, dobc.&&CreationAuthor&& from &&DmsObject&& dobc inner join &&Folder&& flc on dobc.&&Id&& = flc.&&Id&& where dobc.&&Id&& = $1 union all select depg.&&Id&&, depg.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, depg.&&Folder&&, flg.&&FolderType&&, depg.&&CreationAuthor&& from &&DmsObject&& depg inner join t_Rec on t_Rec.&&Folder&& = depg.&&Id&& inner join &&Folder&& flg on depg.&&Id&& = flg.&&Id&& )
select t_Rec.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, t_Rec.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, t_Rec.&&Folder&& as &&FolderId&&, t_Rec.&&FolderType&& as &&FolderType&&, t_Rec.&&CreationAuthor&& as &&CreationAuthor&& from t_Rec
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetSubfoldersQuery
procedure.text:
create or replace function GetSubfolders(p_FolderId bigint) returns table(&&Id&& bigint)
as $$
with recursive t_Rec as ( select dobc.&&Id&&, dobc.&&Folder&& from &&DmsObject&& dobc inner join &&Folder&& fold on dobc.&&Id&& = fold.&&Id&& where dobc.&&Id&& = $1 union all select depg.&&Id&&, depg.&&Folder&& from &&DmsObject&& depg inner join &&Folder&& fld on depg.&&Id&& = fld.&&Id&& inner join t_Rec on t_Rec.&&Id&& = depg.&&Folder&& ) select t_Rec.&&Id&& as &&Id&& from t_Rec
$$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetSubDmsObjectsQuery
UpdateInheritDmsObjectPermissions
UpdateInheritDmsObjectPermissionsPatch
GetSubgroupsMGroups
procedure.text:
create or replace function GetSubgroupsMGroups(&&GroupId&& bigint) returns table(&&Id&& bigint) as $$
with recursive t_Rec as ( select &&Id&&, &&ParentGroup&& from &&DocumentMetadataGroup&& where &&Id&& = $1 union all select dm.&&Id&&, dm.&&ParentGroup&& from &&DocumentMetadataGroup&& dm inner join t_Rec on t_Rec.&&Id&& = dm.&&ParentGroup&& ) select t_Rec.&&Id&& as &&Id&& from t_Rec $$ language sql;

procedure.name: GetPermissionToAdd

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: WITH cte AS ( SELECT * FROM &&DmsObjectPermissionUpdateQueueItem&& p WHERE &&ServerConnectionUid&& IS NULL AND &&Attempt&& < :attemptLength AND &&NextUpdateDate&& <= :currentTimestamp ORDER BY &&Attempt&& DESC, &&CreationDate&& ASC LIMIT :count FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE &&DmsObjectPermissionUpdateQueueItem&& pruqi SET &&ServerConnectionUid&& = :serverConnectionUid, &&LastUpdateDate&& = :currentTimestamp FROM cte WHERE pruqi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&& RETURNING cte.*

WITH cte AS ( SELECT &&Id&& FROM &&DmsObjectPermissionUpdateQueueItem&& WHERE &&ServerConnectionUid&& = :serverConnectionUid FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE &&DmsObjectPermissionUpdateQueueItem&& pruqi SET &&ServerConnectionUid&& = null FROM cte WHERE pruqi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&&

procedure.name: DmsObjectPermissionPatch

script.name: CreateLoadPermissions
script.text: INSERT INTO &&DmsObjectPermission&& ( &&Id&&, &&Uid&&, &&DmsObject&&, &&PermissionId&&, &&User&&, &&Group&&, &&OrganizationItemPosition&&, &&OrganizationItemEmployee&&, &&UserSecuritySetCacheId&&, &&PermissionRole&&, &&InheritedFromFolder&& ) SELECT nextval('G_DmsObjectPermission'), uuid_generate_v4(), &&DmsObject&&, '8DD6E1D3-08B3-46CA-9B0C-FEEB98FCF20D', &&User&&, &&Group&&, &&OrganizationItemPosition&&, &&OrganizationItemEmployee&&, &&UserSecuritySetCacheId&&, &&PermissionRole&&, &&InheritedFromFolder&& from &&DmsObjectPermission&& p where p.&&PermissionId&& = 'EBD6105A-AB44-404D-8B03-1D260EBB2881'
